query:
INSERT INTO news (ticker, title, description, url, source, publishedAt, imageUrl) VALUES 
('NVDA', 'NVIDIA Announces New AI Chip', 'NVIDIA unveiled its latest AI processor with improved performance', 'https://example.com/nvda1', 'TechNews', '2025-10-23 10:00:00', 'https://example.com/image1.jpg'),
('NVDA', 'NVIDIA Stock Reaches New High', 'NVIDIA shares hit record high on strong earnings', 'https://example.com/nvda2', 'MarketWatch', '2025-10-22 15:30:00', 'https://example.com/image2.jpg'),
('META', 'Meta Invests in AI Research', 'Meta announces $10B investment in AI infrastructure', 'https://example.com/meta1', 'TechCrunch', '2025-10-23 09:00:00', 'https://example.com/image3.jpg'),
('META', 'Meta Quarterly Results Beat Expectations', 'Meta reports strong Q3 earnings', 'https://example.com/meta2', 'Reuters', '2025-10-21 14:00:00', 'https://example.com/image4.jpg'),
('TSLA', 'Tesla Launches New Model', 'Tesla introduces new electric vehicle', 'https://example.com/tsla1', 'Bloomberg', '2025-10-23 08:30:00', 'https://example.com/image5.jpg'),
('MSFT', 'Microsoft Expands Cloud Services', 'Microsoft announces new Azure features', 'https://example.com/msft1', 'TechNews', '2025-10-22 11:00:00', 'https://example.com/image6.jpg'),
('GOOGL', 'Google AI Breakthrough', 'Google announces major AI advancement', 'https://example.com/googl1', 'TechCrunch', '2025-10-21 16:00:00', 'https://example.com/image7.jpg'),
('AMZN', 'Amazon Expands AWS Services', 'Amazon launches new cloud computing features', 'https://example.com/amzn1', 'MarketWatch', '2025-10-20 13:00:00', 'https://example.com/image8.jpg'),
('JNJ', 'Johnson & Johnson Drug Approval', 'FDA approves new J&J pharmaceutical', 'https://example.com/jnj1', 'MedicalNews', '2025-10-22 10:00:00', 'https://example.com/image9.jpg'),
('V', 'Visa Reports Strong Growth', 'Visa announces record transaction volume', 'https://example.com/v1', 'FinanceNews', '2025-10-21 12:00:00', 'https://example.com/image10.jpg');
